title: Fruiterra S4 - Create 6
description: Fruiterra S4 highlights the newly updated Create version 6! 🐸
body:
## 📝 Peach's Note

Fruiterra returns for its fourth season! Did somebody say... Frogs? 🐸 Join us in exploring the new update for Create, adding the ability to have a lot more automation and transportation within your factories!

*Designed with love for fwendos :3*

## 🐱‍🚀 Peach's Challenges
> Join the checklist [here](https://checkraft.com/checklist/fruiterra-s4)!
- **Hard Rock** – Create an elevator that reaches down to bedrock level.
- **Mineral Farmer** – Create an iron and gold farm.
- **Master Chef** – Create an automated farm for food of your choice.
- **Vault Monster** – Set up a robust storage system.
- **All Aboard** – Create a working train route with at least three stops. Include a passenger station and a cargo loading station.
- **Steam Powered** – Build a level 9 steam boiler.
- **Frog Powered** – Build an automatic system that uses frogports and packages.
- **Triple AAA** – Fully automate the machines from the Andesite Age. 
- **Trade Network** – Setup shops with vendors and trade routes using.
- **Liftoff** – Craft and use the Jetpack, then build a refuelling station for it.
- **Thriller!** – Set up a fully automated mob spawner system using the mechanical spawner.
- **Pattern Printing** – Use pattern schematics to mass-produce a custom decorative item or structure.

## 😨 Issues?

If you come across any major issues, please join [the discord server](https://discord.com/invite/FjfsnMy) and let me know!
